scenes.title: 开篇·墨晕
scenes.first_frame_prompt: A finished cloisonne enamel tripod ding censer (Jingtailan) slowly emerging from soft ink wash gradients in Chinese ink wash animation style...
scenes.motion_prompt: The cloisonne vessel slowly materializes from ink wash, golden wires and enamel colors gradually emerge from the mist, soft ink ripples continue to spread outward
scenes.narration: 千年的炉火凝于一器，这是掐丝珐琅的故事

scenes.title: 历史穿越
scenes.first_frame_prompt: Interior corner of a Ming-Qing dynasty imperial palace in Chinese ink wash animation style...
scenes.motion_prompt: Camera slowly pushes in toward the cloisonne vessel on the imperial desk, the background pillars drift slightly out of focus, soft daylight shifts across the scene
scenes.narration: 元末明初，珐琅工艺自西域传入中原；至景泰年间因御用而盛，得名景泰蓝

scenes.title: 设计画稿
scenes.first_frame_prompt: Top-down close-up of an artisan's hand holding a fine brush, drawing cloisonne vessel patterns on rice paper...
scenes.motion_prompt: The artisan's hand moves the brush across the rice paper, slowly drawing elegant curves and lines that form cloisonne vessel patterns
scenes.narration: 一器之始，是画稿。匠人以墨在宣纸上勾出器形与纹样

scenes.title: 制胎
scenes.first_frame_prompt: Close-up of an artisan's hand holding a blacksmith hammer above a red copper sheet on an iron anvil...
scenes.motion_prompt: The artisan's hand raises the hammer and strikes the red copper sheet rhythmically, the copper gradually bends under each strike
scenes.narration: 制胎，以锤击紫铜，令其成器之骨

scenes.title: 掐丝
scenes.first_frame_prompt: Top-down close-up of an artisan's hand using tweezers to bend a thin copper wire over a half-finished cloisonne copper blank...
scenes.motion_prompt: The artisan's hand carefully bends the copper wire with tweezers, slowly shaping it into a curved pattern on the cloisonne blank
scenes.narration: 掐丝为最见功力之工序，匠人以镊将细铜丝弯折成山水花鸟

scenes.title: 点蓝
scenes.first_frame_prompt: Top-down close-up of an artisan's hand using a small spoon to drop blue enamel powder into a copper wire compartment on a cloisonne piece...
scenes.motion_prompt: A small spoon carefully drops blue enamel powder into a wire compartment, then moves to the next section, the color fills the gap between copper wires
scenes.narration: 点蓝，将矿物研磨的各色釉料，填入铜丝围成的格中

scenes.title: 烧制
scenes.first_frame_prompt: Close-up of a traditional Chinese brick kiln mouth in Chinese ink wash animation style...
scenes.motion_prompt: Subtle flickering glow from the kiln mouth, embers shift slightly, warm light pulses on nearby copper blanks, a copper blank is pushed into the kiln
scenes.narration: 入窑烧制，高温令釉料熔融，与铜丝紧紧相拥

scenes.title: 反复入窑
scenes.first_frame_prompt: Several finished and half-finished copper blanks resting on a wooden shelf near a traditional Chinese brick kiln...
scenes.motion_prompt: Soft mist drifts across the copper blanks, the kiln's orange glow subtly pulses in the background, the atmosphere shifts gently as if marking the passage of time
scenes.narration: 反复入窑，反复点蓝，一件器物需七十二道工序

scenes.title: 磨光
scenes.first_frame_prompt: Close-up of an artisan's hand polishing a cloisonne piece with a sandstone block...
scenes.motion_prompt: The artisan's hand rubs the sandstone across the cloisonne surface in slow circular motions, reflections shift on the polished copper
scenes.narration: 出窑后以砂石打磨，令表面平如镜

scenes.title: 镀金
scenes.first_frame_prompt: Close-up of a cloisonne piece being gilded, golden liquid being applied to copper wires...
scenes.motion_prompt: Golden liquid flows slowly across the copper wires, the gilding gradually transforms the wires into gleaming gold lines, warm light reflects off the golden surface
scenes.narration: 终以镀金，将金液敷于铜丝之上，金线夺目，器物方成

scenes.title: 收束
scenes.first_frame_prompt: A finished cloisonne enamel tripod ding censer (Jingtailan) centered in a vast white space...
scenes.motion_prompt: The cloisonne vessel slowly rotates in the empty space, light glides across the golden wires and enamel surface, soft ink mist drifts around it, the scene gradually fades to white
scenes.narration: 掐丝珐琅，是凝固的火焰，是凝固的时光
